_global.text:
## Summary
Build BizBook from scratch as a single deployable service: a React + TypeScript SPA (Vite, React Router, Tailwind) served by an Express + TypeScript API with Prisma/SQLite, JWT role-based auth, seeded demo users, and deep-linkable routes for every UI state.

## Scope
This is a greenfield repo (only README + Colossus deploy workflow exist). All application files below are new.

### Files to create — Backend (`server/`)
- `server/package.json` — deps: express, @prisma/client, prisma, bcryptjs, jsonwebtoken, zod, cors, dotenv; dev: typescript, tsx, @types/*.
- `server/tsconfig.json` — TS config, outDir `dist`.
- `server/prisma/schema.prisma` — SQLite datasource; models User, Client, Service, Appointment (below).
- `server/prisma/seed.ts` — seed 1 ADMIN + 1 USER, sample services/clients; **print `SEED_CREDS_JSON={...}`** to stdout.
- `server/src/index.ts` — Express bootstrap; mounts `/api/*`; serves SPA static build (`../web/dist`) with catch-all to `index.html`; listens on `process.env.PORT || 8080`.
- `server/src/db.ts` — Prisma client singleton.
- `server/src/config.ts` — env: `JWT_SECRET`, `APP_TZ` (default `UTC`), `PORT`.
- `server/src/auth/jwt.ts` — sign/verify JWT (`{sub, role}`).
- `server/src/auth/middleware.ts` — `requireAuth`, `requireRole('ADMIN')`.
- `server/src/routes/auth.ts` — `POST /signup` (first user → ADMIN), `POST /login`, `POST /logout`, `GET /me`.
- `server/src/routes/clients.ts` — CRUD (ADMIN).
- `server/src/routes/services.ts` — CRUD (ADMIN).
- `server/src/routes/appointments.ts` — list (filter by status/date), create (USER+ADMIN), `PATCH /:id/status` (ADMIN: completed/cancelled).
- `server/src/routes/dashboard.ts` — `GET /today` (today's appts time-sorted + remaining count).
- `server/src/routes/revenue.ts` — `GET /summary` (week + month completed totals, ADMIN).
- `server/src/routes/health.ts` — `GET /health`, `GET /health/deep` (DB ping).
- `server/src/lib/dates.ts` — `APP_TZ`-aware today/week(Mon–Sun)/month boundaries.
- `server/src/lib/validate.ts` — zod schemas + error helper.

### Files to create — Frontend (`web/`)
- `web/package.json` — react, react-dom, react-router-dom, axios; dev: vite, typescript, tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer, @types/*.
- `web/vite.config.ts` — dev proxy `/api` → `http://localhost:8080`; build to `dist`.
- `web/tailwind.config.js`, `web/postcss.config.js`, `web/index.html`, `web/src/main.tsx`, `web/src/index.css`.
- `web/src/App.tsx` — Router with all routes + guards; app shell header shows **"BizBook"**.
- `web/src/api/client.ts` — axios instance, attaches `Authorization: Bearer`, 401 → redirect `/login`.
- `web/src/auth/AuthContext.tsx` — token/user state in localStorage; `login/logout/me`.
- `web/src/auth/RequireAuth.tsx`, `web/src/auth/RequireAdmin.tsx` — route guards.
- `web/src/components/AppShell.tsx` — header ("BizBook"), nav, logout.
- `web/src/components/Modal.tsx` — reusable dialog driven by `?modal=` query param.
- Pages: `web/src/pages/Login.tsx`, `Signup.tsx`, `Today.tsx`, `Clients.tsx`, `Services.tsx`, `Appointments.tsx`, `Revenue.tsx`.

### Files to create — Root
- `Dockerfile` — multi-stage: build `web` (Vite) → build `server` (tsc) → runtime Node 20-slim; runs `prisma migrate deploy && node dist/index.js`; entry seeds if empty; exposes `$PORT`.
- `.dockerignore`, `.env.example`, root `README.md` (run/deploy notes), `package.json` (root scripts: `dev`, `build`, `seed`).

### Dependencies
- Backend: express, prisma/@prisma/client (SQLite), bcryptjs, jsonwebtoken, zod, cors, dotenv.
- Frontend: react, react-router-dom, axios, tailwindcss.

### Integrations
- None (no third-party APIs/SDKs).

### Assumptions
- Stack chosen (greenfield): React+Vite+TS SPA served by Express+TS API, Prisma+SQLite, JWT auth. Single Docker image deployed via Colossus, listening on `$PORT` (default 8080).
- `full_auth` model: ADMIN + USER roles; login/signup/logout + guards. First signup user becomes ADMIN. Public routes: `/login`, `/signup`, `/api/health`, `/api/health/deep`.
- Role split: Clients & Services CRUD = ADMIN; appointment booking = USER+ADMIN; complete/cancel = ADMIN; Today dashboard = both roles; Revenue = ADMIN.
- Price stored as integer `priceCents`; displayed formatted. Duration in minutes (int).
- Date boundaries computed in `APP_TZ` (default UTC); week = Monday–Sunday; month = calendar month.
- Landing route after login = `/today`.

## Data Model (Prisma)
- **User**: id, email (unique), passwordHash, name, role (`ADMIN|USER`), createdAt.
- **Client**: id, name, phone, email?, notes?, createdAt.
- **Service**: id, name, durationMinutes (int), priceCents (int), createdAt.
- **Appointment**: id, clientId→Client, serviceId→Service, startTime (DateTime), status (`BOOKED|COMPLETED|CANCELLED`, default BOOKED), createdById→User, createdAt.

## Routes (frontend, all deep-linkable)
- `/login`, `/signup` (public).
- `/today` — Front Desk dashboard (guarded).
- `/clients` — list; `?modal=create` / `?modal=edit&id=` for create/edit dialogs (ADMIN).
- `/services` — list; `?modal=create` / `?modal=edit&id=` (ADMIN).
- `/appointments` — list; filters bound to `?status=` & `?date=`; `?modal=book` for booking dialog.
- `/revenue` — weekly/monthly summary (ADMIN).
Each route carries a `data.flow` node; unknown paths redirect to `/today`.

## Implementation Plan

### Step 1: Scaffold repo & tooling
Create root `package.json` workspaces/scripts, `server/` and `web/` package/ts/vite/tailwind configs, `.env.example`, `.dockerignore`.

### Step 2: Prisma schema, migration, seed
**Files:** `server/prisma/schema.prisma`, `server/prisma/seed.ts`
Define models; create initial migration. Seed hashes passwords, inserts ADMIN + USER + a few services/clients, and prints `SEED_CREDS_JSON={"admin":{...},"user":{...}}`.

### Step 3: Auth backend
**Files:** `server/src/auth/*`, `server/src/routes/auth.ts`
bcrypt password check, JWT issue/verify, `requireAuth`/`requireRole`. Signup makes first user ADMIN; login returns `{token, user}`; `/me` returns current user.

### Step 4: Core API resources
**Files:** `routes/clients.ts`, `routes/services.ts`, `routes/appointments.ts`
CRUD with zod validation. Appointments include client+service relations; `PATCH /:id/status` (ADMIN) transitions BOOKED→COMPLETED/CANCELLED.

### Step 5: Dashboard, revenue, health
**Files:** `routes/dashboard.ts`, `routes/revenue.ts`, `routes/health.ts`, `lib/dates.ts`
`/dashboard/today`: appts with startTime within today (APP_TZ), sorted asc, plus remaining (BOOKED, future) count. `/revenue/summary`: sum `service.priceCents` of COMPLETED appts within current week and month. Health endpoints public.

### Step 6: Server bootstrap + static serving
**File:** `server/src/index.ts`
Mount routes under `/api`; serve `web/dist` static + SPA fallback; listen on `$PORT`.

### Step 7: Frontend shell, auth, routing
**Files:** `web/src/App.tsx`, `auth/*`, `components/AppShell.tsx`, `api/client.ts`
Header renders "BizBook". Guards protect all non-public routes; admin-only routes use `RequireAdmin`. Axios attaches token; 401 → `/login`.

### Step 8: Pages
**Files:** `web/src/pages/*`
- Login/Signup forms.
- Today: `Front Desk — Today` heading, time-sorted list (client + service), remaining count.
- Clients/Services: tables + create/edit modals (query-param driven) + delete.
- Appointments: list with `?status=`/`?date=` filters, book modal, complete/cancel actions (ADMIN).
- Revenue: weekly & monthly totals (formatted currency).

### Step 9: Dockerfile & deploy wiring
**File:** `Dockerfile`
Multi-stage build; runtime runs `prisma migrate deploy`, conditional seed, `node dist/index.js`. Ensure `/api/health` returns 200 for Colossus.

## Testing Strategy
- **Auth:** seed prints `SEED_CREDS_JSON`; admin login → lands on `/today`; guarded route without token → `/login`.
- **Clients:** POST client with name+phone → appears in `GET /api/clients` and list UI.
- **Services:** POST service (name/duration/price) → appears in list.
- **Appointments:** USER books future slot → status `booked`; ADMIN `PATCH status=completed` → `completed`.
- **Today:** appts for today sorted by time under "Front Desk — Today"; remaining count correct.
- **Revenue:** after completing an appt, weekly total includes its `priceCents`.
- **Routing:** each route + `?modal=`/`?status=`/`?date=` is directly loadable (deep-link) and restores state.
- **Deploy:** `docker build .` succeeds; container serves SPA and `/api/health` on `$PORT`.

## Risks
- Colossus expected port/health path is inferred (`$PORT`/`/api/health`) — verify against platform defaults; adjust Dockerfile `EXPOSE`/env if needed.
- SQLite file persistence depends on deploy volume; if ephemeral, seed-on-boot keeps demo data present but user data won't persist across redeploys (acceptable for demo; swap to Postgres later if needed).
- Time-zone-sensitive "today"/week/month math — mitigated by single `APP_TZ` and explicit Mon–Sun week; document the default (UTC).

requirements.text: Change the shell header product name from BizBook to BizBook Pro
